Server accepts DELETE on main page (no method validation)

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~40,364 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 2% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 20 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~4,096 tokens (10% of page)
Reading this page costs $0.05–$0.61 per load ($0.25–$3.03 for a 5-page session)
105 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

checks.name: a11y

All 170 images have alt attributes (21 descriptive, 149 decorative)
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
37 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0

checks.name: performance

Compact payload: 22KB
